TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: E atu U nikalpacaw šŅĄÁÉŹśąįÁą≠ 2014 a mihcaan namalpacaw nadikudan sa , aydaay a cung-tung- nu U-kelan wiy-ke-tu. ya-nu-ke-wiy-ci paalesen nu katuuday . 2014 .cay katenes , Elu-se micumud hamin han ni ke-li-mi-ya , tayda itini i tun-pa a kitidaan pacangday tu silusiday a hitay u calilaway , šłćšĻÖŚĺĆ, ,imahini palekal tu ci lu-kan-se-ke a zen-min- pulung a kanatal , tun-nay-ce-ke pulung a kanatal tusa malaliyas ku sapikuwan .ya tun-pa malingatu a malpacaw . .2014 a mihcaan katukuh 2022 a mihcaan , u adidiay a sinilusiday a hitay masasuada matulin ayda .2014 .namakay 2021 a mihcaan 3 a bulad , E a hitay kina tusa a mibakuhac tu U-kelan nu lilis misa tabaki a mibakuhac masaupu amin ku hitay i tini , mikiayaw itini I lilis nu E atu U nu lilis .Ťá™2021ŚĻī3śúąŤĶ∑, .2022 a mihcaan 2 abulad 21 a demiad , u E-le-se pangiha palutatenga u tun-ney-ce-ke a kanatal , lu-kan-se-ke a kanatal u E a hitay micumud i tun-pa-se. 2022ŚĻī2śúą21śó•, .2022 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 24 a demiad , ci Bu-ting pangiha a malingatu " micidekay a nu hitay a kawaw" u hitay namakay sepat a dadan namakay amis, timula, amisan, nuwalian nu amis sepat ku caculilan u hamin micumud i U-ke-lan , kyu imahini macunus ku nipalekal tu sakalepacaw .2022ŚĻī2śúą24śó•, . Lu abulad , E a hitay ci ci-hu mibakuhac tu U a hitay paculiyan , mapuut ku hitay nu E a hitay namakay U-kelan a tadikud . 3śúąŤĶ∑, .9 ay abulad , E-lu-se kinacacay aca pangiha tu sapihaminay muwala tu Utung sepat a kitidaan a pala'. 9śúą, .U a hitay 2022 a mihcaan masiku kina tusa mibakuhac a paculi , maala nu heni ku hal-ke-hu, hel-sung a tusaay a pala . ÁÉŹŤĽćŚú®2022 .nadikudan ani kalpacaw sa matenes matatengteng ku ni kalpacaw . . U nudikuda ŤÉĆśôĮ u sakalpacaw yadah kukamu nu binawlan , padu E-le-se maydih I nuayawan nu su-lin a kitidaan muliyaw malingatu , ,u E-lu-se paayaw tunu mukasi , u sulin malakalak nadikudan U-ke-lan itini paayaw amin tu U-ke-lan , makayi tu E-ley-se a sapikuwan , ,itini capiay u E-lu-se a binacadan palutatenga amin ku binacadan makayi a buliyasan , ,u amisay a misaahebal kyu u Eluse inayay ku lihalay ." .u mikuwanay a tademaw ci paw-lu. ta-ni-ay-li sakamu sa , sakamu sa ku Eluse sisikining tu sulin a kanatal mikawa micalilaw , ,maydih kuheni muliyaw a mipulu; tu Ukelan ; imahini sakay binacadan tu Ukelan sipakayni mikuwanay u sakala ada kumahidaay .u duma sa i u-cu u sakalihalay a kitidaan , u Eluse ya nuamisan a nikasasusakamu u miadaay sa , ,u duma a kanatal u u-cu makaala tu sakalihalay a patucek sapipulu tu Eluse ani pisatabaki tu nidatengan . .
S.PHON: …ô atu u nikar~…ĺpa ¶aw **** **** a mińß ¶aan namar~…ĺpa ¶aw nadikudan sa , ajdaaj a ¶uŇč-tuŇč- nu u-k…ôr~…ĺan wij-k…ô-tu. ja-nu-k…ô-wij- ¶i paar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn nu katuudaj . **** . ¶aj kat…ôn…ôs , …ôr~…ĺu-s…ô mi ¶umud ńßamin ńßan ni k…ô-r~…ĺi-mi-ja , tajda itini i tun-pa a kitidaan pa ¶aŇčdaj tu sir~…ĺusidaj a ńßitaj u ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺawaj , ***, ,imańßini par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶i r~…ĺu-kan-s…ô-k…ô a z…ôn-min- pur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ , tun-naj- ¶…ô-k…ô pur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ tusa mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas ku sapikuwan .ja tun-pa mar~…ĺiŇčatu a mar~…ĺpa ¶aw . .**** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan , u adidiaj a sinir~…ĺusidaj a ńßitaj masasuada matur~…ĺin ajda .**** .namakaj **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad , …ô a ńßitaj kina tusa a mibakuńßa ¶ tu u-k…ôr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺir~…ĺis misa tabaki a mibakuńßa ¶ masaupu amin ku ńßitaj i tini , mikiajaw itini i r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu …ô atu u nu r~…ĺir~…ĺis .*********, .**** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad , u …ô-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô paŇčińßa par~…ĺutat…ôŇča u tun-n…ô- ¶…ô-k…ô a kanatar~…ĺ , r~…ĺu-kan-s…ô-k…ô a kanatar~…ĺ u …ô a ńßitaj mi ¶umud i tun-pa-s…ô. **********, .**** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad , ¶i bu-tiŇč paŇčińßa a mar~…ĺiŇčatu " mi ¶id…ôkaj a nu ńßitaj a kawaw" u ńßitaj namakaj s…ôpat a dadan namakaj amis, timur~…ĺa, amisan, nuwar~…ĺian nu amis s…ôpat ku ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan u ńßamin mi ¶umud i u-k…ô-r~…ĺan , kju imańßini ma ¶unus ku nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw .**********, . r~…ĺu abur~…ĺad , …ô a ńßitaj ¶i ¶i-ńßu mibakuńßa ¶ tu u a ńßitaj pa ¶ur~…ĺijan , mapuut ku ńßitaj nu …ô a ńßitaj namakaj u-k…ôr~…ĺan a tadikud . ***, .* aj abur~…ĺad , …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a paŇčińßa tu sapińßaminaj muwar~…ĺa tu utuŇč s…ôpat a kitidaan a par~…ĺa Ē~ °. **, .u a ńßitaj **** a mińß ¶aan masiku kina tusa mibakuńßa ¶ a pa ¶ur~…ĺi , maar~…ĺa nu ńß…ôni ku ńßar~…ĺ-k…ô-ńßu, ńß…ôr~…ĺ-suŇč a tusaaj a par~…ĺa . ******* .nadikudan ani kar~…ĺpa ¶aw sa mat…ôn…ôs matat…ôŇčt…ôŇč ku ni kar~…ĺpa ¶aw . . u nudikuda ** u sakar~…ĺpa ¶aw jadańß kukamu nu binawr~…ĺan , padu …ô-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô majdińß i nuajawan nu su-r~…ĺin a kitidaan mur~…ĺijaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu , ,u …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô paajaw tunu mukasi , u sur~…ĺin mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak nadikudan u-k…ô-r~…ĺan itini paajaw amin tu u-k…ô-r~…ĺan , makaji tu …ô-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô a sapikuwan , ,itini ¶apiaj u …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô a bina ¶adan par~…ĺutat…ôŇča amin ku bina ¶adan makaji a bur~…ĺijasan , ,u amisaj a misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ kju u …ôr~…ĺus…ô inajaj ku r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ." .u mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw ¶i paw-r~…ĺu. ta-ni-aj-r~…ĺi sakamu sa , sakamu sa ku …ôr~…ĺus…ô sisikiniŇč tu sur~…ĺin a kanatar~…ĺ mikawa mi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw , ,majdińß kuńß…ôni mur~…ĺijaw a mipur~…ĺu; tu uk…ôr~…ĺan ; imańßini sakaj bina ¶adan tu uk…ôr~…ĺan sipakajni mikuwanaj u sakar~…ĺa ada kumańßidaaj .u duma sa i u- ¶u u sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a kitidaan , u …ôr~…ĺus…ô ja nuamisan a nikasasusakamu u miadaaj sa , ,u duma a kanatar~…ĺ u u- ¶u makaar~…ĺa tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a patu ¶…ôk sapipur~…ĺu tu …ôr~…ĺus…ô ani pisatabaki tu nidat…ôŇčan . .
S.FORM: E atu U nikalpacaw šŅĄÁÉŹśąįÁą≠ 2014 a mihcaan namalpacaw nadikudan sa , aydaay a cung-tung- nu U-kelan wiy-ke-tu. ya-nu-ke-wiy-ci paalesen nu katuuday . 2014 .cay katenes , Elu-se micumud hamin han ni ke-li-mi-ya , tayda itini i tun-pa a kitidaan pacangday tu silusiday a hitay u calilaway , šłćšĻÖŚĺĆ, ,imahini palekal tu ci lu-kan-se-ke a zen-min- pulung a kanatal , tun-nay-ce-ke pulung a kanatal tusa malaliyas ku sapikuwan .ya tun-pa malingatu a malpacaw . .2014 a mihcaan katukuh 2022 a mihcaan , u adidiay a sinilusiday a hitay masasuada matulin ayda .2014 .namakay 2021 a mihcaan 3 a bulad , E a hitay kina tusa a mibakuhac tu U-kelan nu lilis misa tabaki a mibakuhac masaupu amin ku hitay i tini , mikiayaw itini I lilis nu E atu U nu lilis .Ťá™2021ŚĻī3śúąŤĶ∑, .2022 a mihcaan 2 abulad 21 a demiad , u E-le-se pangiha palutatenga u tun-ney-ce-ke a kanatal , lu-kan-se-ke a kanatal u E a hitay micumud i tun-pa-se. 2022ŚĻī2śúą21śó•, .2022 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 24 a demiad , ci Bu-ting pangiha a malingatu " micidekay a nu hitay a kawaw" u hitay namakay sepat a dadan namakay amis, timula, amisan, nuwalian nu amis sepat ku caculilan u hamin micumud i U-ke-lan , kyu imahini macunus ku nipalekal tu sakalepacaw .2022ŚĻī2śúą24śó•, . Lu abulad , E a hitay ci ci-hu mibakuhac tu U a hitay paculiyan , mapuut ku hitay nu E a hitay namakay U-kelan a tadikud . 3śúąŤĶ∑, .9 ay abulad , E-lu-se kinacacay aca pangiha tu sapihaminay muwala tu Utung sepat a kitidaan a pala'. 9śúą, .U a hitay 2022 a mihcaan masiku kina tusa mibakuhac a paculi , maala nu heni ku hal-ke-hu, hel-sung a tusaay a pala . ÁÉŹŤĽćŚú®2022 .nadikudan ani kalpacaw sa matenes matatengteng ku ni kalpacaw . . U nudikuda ŤÉĆśôĮ u sakalpacaw yadah kukamu nu binawlan , padu E-le-se maydih I nuayawan nu su-lin a kitidaan muliyaw malingatu , ,u E-lu-se paayaw tunu mukasi , u sulin malakalak nadikudan U-ke-lan itini paayaw amin tu U-ke-lan , makayi tu E-ley-se a sapikuwan , ,itini capiay u E-lu-se a binacadan palutatenga amin ku binacadan makayi a buliyasan , ,u amisay a misaahebal kyu u Eluse inayay ku lihalay ." .u mikuwanay a tademaw ci paw-lu. ta-ni-ay-li sakamu sa , sakamu sa ku Eluse sisikining tu sulin a kanatal mikawa micalilaw , ,maydih kuheni muliyaw a mipulu; tu Ukelan ; imahini sakay binacadan tu Ukelan sipakayni mikuwanay u sakala ada kumahidaay .u duma sa i u-cu u sakalihalay a kitidaan , u Eluse ya nuamisan a nikasasusakamu u miadaay sa , ,u duma a kanatal u u-cu makaala tu sakalihalay a patucek sapipulu tu Eluse ani pisatabaki tu nidatengan . .

nu ńßitaj a kawaw" u ńßitaj namakaj s…ôpat a dadan namakaj amis, timur~…ĺa, amisan, nuwar~…ĺian nu amis s…ôpat ku ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan u ńßamin mi ¶umud i u-k…ô-r~…ĺan , kju imańßini ma ¶unus ku nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw .**********, . r~…ĺu abur~…ĺad , …ô a ńßitaj ¶i ¶i-ńßu mibakuńßa ¶ tu u a ńßitaj pa ¶ur~…ĺijan , mapuut ku ńßitaj nu …ô a ńßitaj namakaj u-k…ôr~…ĺan a tadikud . ***, .* aj abur~…ĺad , …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a paŇčińßa tu sapińßaminaj muwar~…ĺa tu utuŇč s…ôpat a kitidaan a par~…ĺa Ē~ °. **, .u a ńßitaj **** a mińß ¶aan masiku kina tusa mibakuńßa ¶ a pa ¶ur~…ĺi , maar~…ĺa nu ńß…ôni ku ńßar~…ĺ-k…ô-ńßu, ńß…ôr~…ĺ-suŇč a tusaaj a par~…ĺa . ******* .nadikudan ani kar~…ĺpa ¶aw sa mat…ôn…ôs matat…ôŇčt…ôŇč ku ni kar~…ĺpa ¶aw . . u nudikuda ** u sakar~…ĺpa ¶aw jadańß kukamu nu binawr~…ĺan , padu …ô-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô majdińß i nuajawan nu su-r~…ĺin a kitidaan mur~…ĺijaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu , ,u …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô paajaw tunu mukasi , u sur~…ĺin mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak nadikudan u-k…ô-r~…ĺan itini paajaw amin tu u-k…ô-r~…ĺan , makaji tu …ô-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô a sapikuwan , ,itini ¶apiaj u …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô a bina ¶adan par~…ĺutat…ôŇča amin ku bina ¶adan makaji a bur~…ĺijasan , ,u amisaj a misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ kju u …ôr~…ĺus…ô inajaj ku r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ." .u mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw ¶i paw-r~…ĺu. ta-ni-aj-r~…ĺi sakamu sa , sakamu sa ku …ôr~…ĺus…ô sisikiniŇč tu sur~…ĺin a kanatar~…ĺ mikawa mi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw , ,majdińß kuńß…ôni mur~…ĺijaw a mipur~…ĺu; tu uk…ôr~…ĺan ; imańßini sakaj bina ¶adan tu uk…ôr~…ĺan sipakajni mikuwanaj u sakar~…ĺa ada kumańßidaaj .u duma sa i u- ¶u u sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a kitidaan , u …ôr~…ĺus…ô ja nuamisan a nikasasusakamu u miadaaj sa , ,u duma a kanatar~…ĺ u u- ¶u makaar~…ĺa tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a patu ¶…ôk sapipur~…ĺu tu …ôr~…ĺus…ô ani pisatabaki tu nidat…ôŇčan . .
